rootCause: After process cards were explicitly rendered with light chip surfaces (inverted=true), ProgressBar kept fixed colors (light-gray track and light-green fill) and did not consume container inversion state, so the fill blended into the light process background and looked invisible while in progress.
resolution: Added an inverted prop to ProgressBar and switched to a dark-green fill with darker track when inverted=true; wired Process.svelte to pass its inversion state into ProgressBar and added regression assertions so in-progress process cards keep visible progress contrast in both inverted and default modes.
